{{Quote|I have been recalled to Coruscant to make my report to the Emperor. The ''Executor'' shall accompany me under the command of Captain Kallic.|Darth Vader|<ref name="Temporary Reassignment">{{WEGCite|story=Temporary Reassignment|book=Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook}}</ref>}}
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Kallic''' of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] briefly served as the temporary [[Commanding officer/Legends|commander]] of the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']], the personal [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], in the aftermath of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Substituting for [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Firmus Piett]], Kallic oversaw the ''Executor''{{'s}} return to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] so that Vader could report his [[Duel on Cloud City/Legends|encounter]] with [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin's]] [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] to [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].

==Biography==
[[File:Executortfu.jpg|thumb|right|270px|Kallic was given temporary command of the ''Executor'' following the Hoth campaign.]]
Kallic was an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] who served aboard the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']],<ref name="CSWE" /> the personal [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of<ref name="Piett Databank">{{DB|character|admiralpiett|Piett, Admiral}}</ref> the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].<ref name="Temporary Reassignment" /> After Vader [[Death/Legends|executed]] his flagship's former [[Commanding officer/Legends|commander]], [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Kendal Ozzel/Legends|Kendal Ozzel]], for incompetence during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]<ref name="Piett Databank" /> in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the Dark [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] promoted [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Firmus Piett/Legends|Firmus Piett]] to [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]]. In turn, the ''Executor''{{'s}} captaincy soon passed to [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Venka]], whom Kallic eventually succeeded as captain of the ''Executor''.<ref name="Piett Databank" />

Shortly after the [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] campaign, Kallic was given temporary command of the ''Executor''<ref name="CSWE" /> at Vader's request<ref name="Vader: The Ultimate Guide">''[[Vader: The Ultimate Guide]]''</ref> while the Dark Lord returned to<ref name="Temporary Reassignment" /> the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="SOTE Sourcebook">''[[Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref> of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] had personally recalled Vader to make his report<ref name="Temporary Reassignment" /> concerning his [[Duel on Cloud City/Legends|failed conversion]] of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin's]] [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]].<ref name="SOTE Sourcebook" /> With Kallic escorting Vader to Coruscant, Admiral Piett remained with the [[Death Squadron/Legends|Imperial Death Squadron]], Vader's [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]], to continue the Empire's hunt for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Once Vader's business on Coruscant concluded, Kallic was scheduled to relinquish command of the ''Executor'' back to Piett.<ref name="Temporary Reassignment" />

==Behind the scenes==
Captain Kallic was created by author [[Peter M. Schweighofer|Peter Schweighofer]] for the short narrative ''[[Temporary Reassignment]]'', published in the [[June]] [[1996]] ''[[Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook]]''. The narrative provides an explanation for why Admiral Piett,<ref name="Temporary Reassignment" /> who commands the ''Executor'' both before and after the events of ''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]'',<ref name="Piett Databank" /> does not appear as the ''Executor''{{'s}} commander in the [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Shadows of the Empire'' novel]].<ref name="SOTE">[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]]</ref>

===Kallic–Venka inconsistency===
Following the release of ''Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook'', sources varied regarding Kallic's place in the ''Executor''{{'s}} captaincy lineage. The [[July]] 1996 second edition of [[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back'']] explained that the ''Executor''{{'s}} captaincy passed to Lieutenant Venka following Firmus Piett's promotion to admiral.<ref name="GG3">[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back'', Second Edition]]</ref> However, the [[2002]] ''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' and the [[2008]] ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' both stated that Kallic was Piett's immediate successor to captain, with Venka's involvement not taken into account.<ref name="CSWE" /><ref name="NEGTC">''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref> Ultimately, [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 89|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 89]], released in [[2003]], and the now-defunct [[StarWars.com]] [[Databank (original)|Databank]] clarified that the ''Executor''{{'s}} captaincy passed to Kallic after Venka.<ref name="Piett Databank" /><ref name="FF89">{{FactFile|89|PIE 3-6|Admiral Firmus Piett}}</ref>
